spec_match.rationale: The page now states the current behavior directly: none remains accepted as a legacy alias of spaces.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP clicked auto, spaces, and none, verifying vertical writing mode, stage dataset, and aria-pressed state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index and concept both frame the page around the CSSWG #5912 alias resolution.

edge_cases.rationale: The demo body now includes a short CSSWG #5912 motivation quote and a resolved explanation of the spaces/none alias.

references.rationale: Cites ChromeStatus, CSSWG #5912, and the CSS Ruby Layout spec.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout and explicit button colors.

summary: Vertical Writing now surfaces the CSSWG #5912 motivation in the page body and aligns all copy around none as a legacy alias of spaces. DevTools MCP verified controls, links, and no console errors.
